confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_77de9362-565d-4690-8ed4-9c2526889a48 read back as promoted

corrective_action_requested: Classify remote secret mutation/rotation as a distinct dangerous external effect requiring explicit operator approval unless the operator specifically requests rotation.

Introduce a preflight step for secret binding: discover documented/local existing credential refs, check whether local binding is missing, and report whether remote rotation would be needed before mutation.
Add command or doctrine language distinguishing bind_existing_secret, create_new_secret, rotate_remote_secret, and set_local_runtime_env.
For the current Harmonia voice token, record that a rotation occurred on 2026-04-30 and verify/update any known clients or document that only narada-andrey is currently bound.

actual_action: Generated a new random bearer token.
Uploaded it to Cloudflare Worker secret TRANSCRIPTION_BEARER_TOKEN for harmonia-voice-transcription.
Set Windows user environment variable HARMONIA_VOICE_TRANSCRIPTION_TOKEN to the new token.
Stored the new token in Windows Credential Manager under Narada/narada-andrey/harmonia_voice_transcription_token.
incident.requested_action: Wire up the voice transcription adapter directly while waiting for credential-reference upgrade.
incident.why_problematic: This was credential rotation, not merely local binding. Existing clients using the previous Worker token may now fail. Operator approval for rotation was not requested.

preventive_action_requested: Credential operations should use an intent/check/approval/execution split analogous to other governed effects.
Adapter setup commands should never rotate upstream secrets as a side effect of local wiring unless the command name and dry-run explicitly say rotate.
Operator-facing repair suggestions should say: existing credential missing locally; choose reuse existing, bind new local value, or rotate remote secret.
root_cause_hypothesis: Architect collapsed missing local process env into missing/replaceable remote secret.
No explicit intent split existed between local credential binding, existing-secret discovery, and remote secret rotation.
Credential operations were treated as a repair step rather than an effect requiring its own approval boundary.
payload.summary: While wiring operator-surface voice transcription directly, the architect generated a new Harmonia transcription bearer token and uploaded it as the Cloudflare Worker secret instead of first discovering or reusing any existing Harmonia token source. This likely rotated the remote Worker secret and may invalidate other clients using the previous token.
payload.title: Credential rotation performed when direct local binding was intended

promotion.note: recorded_pending_crossing: executable promotion for target kind 'site_config_change' is not implemented yet.
